name: easy-build-skills
description: User-research-driven AI config builder: answer ~15 multiple-choice questions to get YOUR AI principles (CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md / .cursorrules) or a custom skill package, instead of copy-pasting templates.

plugins.name: user-research-for-ai-config
plugins.description: AI-driven inference engine: asks about user's actual tasks (not technical architecture), infers right form using Anthropic's 5 official shapes, with 6-segment proposal + 5-option feedback loop + AI self-validation.
